summary: Channel Performance feature fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All features working including navigation, summary cards, 4 charts (Leads by Source bar, Lead Distribution pie, GMV by Source bar, Conversion Rate horizontal bar), filters (date range, city, RM), detailed table with all 6 sources, refresh button. Source filter added to Conversion Intelligence page.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> and <tr> cannot be child of <span> - Does not affect functionality but should be reviewed for production. This is due to dynamic wrapper elements in the table rendering.
Console warning about chart dimensions -1x-1 during initial render - Charts render correctly after initial layout, non-blocking issue.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend channel_analytics_service.py correctly initializes all 6 sources (Meta, Google, Organic, Referral, Planner, Direct) with proper metrics structure
Backend returns sorted sources by total_leads descending with comprehensive metrics (total_leads, confirmed_leads, total_gmv, total_commission, conversion_rate, avg_deal_value, leads_by_stage)
LeadCreate model correctly includes source, campaign, landing_page attribution fields with 'Direct' as default
Backfill endpoint correctly updates leads without source to 'Direct'
Filter options endpoint returns sources array for both Channel Performance and Conversion Intelligence
Conversion Intelligence endpoint accepts source filter parameter
Frontend ChannelPerformancePage has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Summary cards display: Total Leads (100), Confirmed Bookings (8), Total GMV (₹50.0L), Total Commission (₹5.1L), Avg Conversion (8%)
All 4 charts render correctly: Leads by Source bar chart, Lead Distribution pie chart, GMV by Source bar chart, Conversion Rate by Source horizontal bar chart
Detailed breakdown table shows all 6 sources with leads, confirmed, conv%, GMV, commission, avg deal columns
Filters panel includes Date Range, City, and RM filters with proper Select components
Navigation sidebar shows 'Channel Performance' link with Megaphone icon for admin role
seed_data_creation: Test created 2 leads with source attribution: one with source=Meta, campaign=summer_campaign_2025, landing_page=/venues/delhi, and one without source (defaulted to Direct)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Channel Performance feature at /admin/channel-performance fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/channel-performance (metrics by source with filters), POST /api/admin/backfill-lead-sources (backfill leads without source to 'Direct'). Lead model now includes source, campaign, landing_page fields. Filter options endpoint GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence/filters returns 'sources' array. Conversion Intelligence supports source filter parameter. All 6 valid sources: Meta, Google, Organic, Referral, Planner, Direct. Frontend data-testid attributes: toggle-filters-btn, filters-panel, date-range-select, city-filter-select, rm-filter-select, refresh-btn, summary-cards, metric-total-leads, metric-confirmed, metric-gmv, metric-commission, metric-conversion, leads-bar-chart, leads-pie-chart, gmv-bar-chart, conversion-chart, source-table, source-row-{idx}.

GET /api/admin/channel-performance.returns: sources array (6 items with metrics), summary object (total_leads, total_confirmed, total_gmv, total_commission, overall_conversion_rate), filters_applied, generated_at
GET /api/admin/channel-performance.auth_required: admin role only (401 for unauth, 403 for RM)

GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence/f.returns: cities array, rms array, sources array (6 items: Direct, Google, Meta, Organic, Planner, Referral)

filters_tested: source filter works for all 6 source values

POST /api/leads (with source).tested: Lead creation with source=Meta, campaign, landing_page fields

features: Channel Performance link in sidebar with Megaphone icon

charts: Conversion Rate by Source horizontal bar chart

features: Date Range dropdown (Last 7/30/90 Days, Custom, All Time)

sources_displayed: Direct (98 leads, 8 confirmed, 8.2% conv, ₹50.0L GMV, ₹5.1L comm, ₹6.3L avg)

features: Filter integrates with existing date/city/RM filters
